text:
Is the any chase to fix this issue in the next release?

28.07.2012, =D7 21:22, Josh Carroll <josh.carroll@gmail.com> =CE=C1=D0=C9=
=D3=C1=CC(=C1):

> I am experiencing this as well.
>
> FreeBSD pflog.net 8.3-RELEASE-p3 FreeBSD 8.3-RELEASE-p3 #1 r237174:
> Sat Jun 16 17:33:16 PDT 2012
> root@pflog.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/PFLOG  amd64
>
> libtorrent-0.13.2   BitTorrent Library written in C++
> rtorrent-0.9.2      BitTorrent Client written in C++
>
> I tried recompiling rtorrent without xmlrpc-c, but I still get the
> hang. I've also tried setting different $TERM to see if that mattered,
> but with no luck.
>
> Thanks,
> Josh
